questions.question: Which of the following is not the main function of NDP

It helps in detecting when a nei9hbor becomes unreachable. • Duplicate Address Detection (DAD): NDP assists in ensuring the uniqueness Of IPV6 addresses on a local link. • Address Autoconfiguration: It allows hosts to automatically configure their IPv6 addresses through Stateless Address Autoconfiguration (SLAAC). “Path MTU discovery” is a separate function in IPv6, and it is not part of the NDP protocol, Path MTU discovery is used to determine the maximum transmission unit (MTU) of the path between the source and destination to ensure that packets are not fragmented and can be transmitted without issues.

questions.question: As shown in the figure, SWA and SWB runs RSTP independently. SWA and SWB are connected through a cable. Assume that SWA becomes the root bridge. Which of the following statements are false?

options.A: After receiving the RST BPDU with the Proposal bit set to 1, SWB immediately replies with an RST BPDU with the Agreement bit set to I.
options.B: After receiving the RST BPDU with the Proposal bit set to I, from the root bridge, SWB sets all its ports to Synchronizing state.
options.C: After SWB performs synchronization, all ports enter Discarding state.
options.D: After SWA receives an RST BPDIJ with Agreement bit set to I from SWB, GEO/O/I of SWA immediately enter enters the Forwarding state.

questions.reason: The P/A (Proposal/Agreement) mechanism enables the uplink port to quickly transition to Forwarding state. This shortens the time that an uplink port waits before transitioning to Forwarding state. If SWB received RST BPDU (from root bridge) with Proposal bit set to 1, then SWB sets all its ports to Synchronizing state and uplink port from which RST BPDU was received immediately enter Forwarding state. Similarly SWA do the same if it receives RST BPDU from SWB. So, Option B, & D statements are correct. Option A, & C statements are incorrect.

questions.question: The figure shows the PBR configuration on RI. Which of the following statements about the configuration are true?

questions.question: Two commands are configured on the switch: command 1 "stp tc-protection interval interval-value 10" and command 2 "stp tc-protection threshold threshold 2". Which of the following statements are true?

options.B: If the switch receives four TC BPDUs within IOS, the first two TC BPDUs are processed within IOS. the remaining two TC BPDUs Will be processed twice after IOS.

questions.reason: STP tc-protection interval-value is 10 and its threshold is 2. It means that within 10 seconds, switch can delete its ARP entries maximum 2 times. Or we can say that it Will only process 2 TC BPDU within 10 seconds. So, Option-A statement is correct. If switch received 4 TC BPDU (Topology Change BPDU) within 10 seconds, then it Will only process 2 TC BPDU within first 10 seconds and remaining TC BPDU Will be processes after 10 seconds. Soa Option-B is incorrect, and Option-C is correct. An attacker can forge TC BPDU to send multiple TCP BPDU within few seconds to attack on the network. The both commands allow switch to process only 2 TC BPDU within 10 seconds. so, Option-D statement is correct.

questions.question: Regarding the description of the VRRP Slave device, which of the following is correct?

options.B: The Slave responds to the IP packet whose destination IP address is the virtual IP address

questions.reason: VRRP router priority 0 is the lowest priority. If VRRP slave router discovers that the other router (Master VRRP router) has smallest priority, then it will become master. So, Option-A statement is correct. In master-slave relationship, only master device respond to the client packets, stave device will not respond to client packets until it will become master device. So, Option-B statement is incorrect. VRRP slave device only monitor the status of master device by checking its priority value. If slave device did not receive message from master or if it receive message with low priority value, then slave device will become master. So, Option-C statement is correct. VRRP router assign a virtual IP as well as virtual MAC address for forwarding purpose. Client will communicate to VRRP MAC address over layer 2. And only master VRRP router entertain those frames. Slave device will not respond and simply discard those frames. So, Option-D statement is correct.

questions.question: In PIM-DM, which combination of working mechanism construct SPT?

options.C: State refresh
options.D: Diffusion

questions.reason: PIM-Dense Mode (PIM-DM) is mainly used on a multicast network with few group members and is relatively dense. The basic idea of establishing an MDT in PIM-DM mode is "diffuse-prune". That is, multicast traffic is flooded across the entire network and then the paths without group members are pruned. Finally, the multicast distribution tree (SPT) is formed. In addition to flooding and prune mechanisms, PIM-DM also involves neighbor discovery, grafting, Assert and State Refresh mechanisms.
